post.desc:
😡 Which one of you bought that! I was about to buy it!

Anyway, yeah... for some reason Kaguya has a lot of Lunarian artifacts despite being exiled – enough to make an annual expo. I wonder if she's open to selling them, or at least lending them. 🤔 At first I thought Eirin would try to control this, but she probably wouldn't care.

I dunno, maybe she wouldn't mind getting seven dollars for... the f#cking [**Red Stone of Aja?!**](https://en.touhouwiki.net/wiki/Shoot_the_Bullet/Spell_Cards/Level_9#:~:text=「エイジャの赤石」)
